stemHtml: Taking into consideration Northern Oceanic Transition Area (NOTA) and Shannon Oceanic Transition Area (SOTA) - which one is in NAT HLA and which one has the same instrument requirements as NAT HLA?

options.a: Neither NOTA nor SOTA are part of NAT HLA, hence no instruments requirement like in NAT.
options.b: Both NOTA and SOTA are part of NAT HLA, hence instruments requirement like in NAT.
options.c: NOTA is a part of NAT HLA and no required equipment like NAT HLA.
options.d: SOTA is not a part of NAT HLA and no required equipment like NAT HLA, except if routing towards NAT HLA.
